executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体偏弱，绝大多数是 GitHub Changelog 的产品更新，缺少深入技术细节、评测方法、代理系统设计或组织落地经验。
唯一相对值得关注的是 GitHub 企业级“紧急凭证撤销”能力，它与 AI 编码工具大规模落地后的安全与治理问题直接相关，但仍属于较短的功能公告而非深度技术文章。
executive_summary_en: Today’s candidate set is weak overall: most items are GitHub Changelog snippets with limited technical depth and little on agent architecture, evals, harnesses, or adoption playbooks.

The only borderline-valuable item is GitHub’s enterprise break-glass credential revocation capability, which matters for security and governance in AI-assisted engineering environments, but it is still a short product update rather than a deep technical source.

items.title: Self-service credential revocation for incident response - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 为 Enterprise 提供新的“break-glass”自助式凭证撤销能力，企业所有者或具备相应权限的成员可针对单个用户或全企业批量撤销 SSO 授权、删除令牌与 SSH key；个人用户也可在设置中一键撤销自己的全部相关凭证，并通过审计日志和邮件获取追踪信息。
items.summary_en: GitHub added break-glass self-service credential revocation for Enterprise, allowing authorized admins to bulk revoke SSO authorizations and, in some cases, delete tokens and SSH keys across a user or the whole enterprise. Individual users also get a self-service flow to revoke their own credentials, with audit-log and email visibility.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 对正在推广 AI 编码助手、CLI agent 和自动化工作流的组织来说，凭证扩散与代理代表用户执行操作会显著提高事故处置复杂度。这项能力虽然不是 AI coding 本身的创新，但它补齐了企业在“工具被盗用/账户被接管”场景下的快速止血机制。
items.why_it_matters_en: For orgs rolling out AI coding assistants, CLI agents, and automated developer workflows, credential sprawl and delegated execution increase blast radius during incidents. This isn’t an AI-coding breakthrough, but it does strengthen an important operational control for containing compromised developer identities and tooling access.
key_takeaways_zh: 支持企业级批量撤销 SSO 授权，以及在 EMU 场景下删除用户 token 和 SSH key。
提供个人级一键自助撤销入口，并将结果写入审计日志，便于事件响应与合规追踪。
key_takeaways_en: Supports enterprise-scale revocation of SSO authorizations and, for EMU scenarios, deletion of user tokens and SSH keys.
Adds a user self-service one-click revocation flow plus audit-log visibility, improving incident response and compliance traceability.

items.title: Changes to model selection for Free and Student plans - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 将 Copilot Free 与 Student 套餐的模型选择收敛为仅支持自动路由，用户不再手动选择模型；同时移除微软模型的 Preview 标签。
items.summary_en: GitHub is simplifying Copilot Free and Student plans to use only auto model selection, removing manual model choice and retiring the Preview label for Microsoft-released models.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是一个产品策略信号：AI 编码工具正从“让开发者自己挑模型”转向“平台按任务自动路由模型”。但由于仅针对免费/学生计划，且缺少技术实现、评测方法和路由指标，参考价值有限。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is a product-direction signal: AI coding tools are moving from explicit model choice toward platform-managed routing per task. But because it targets only Free/Student plans and provides no routing mechanics, eval methodology, or quality data, the technical value is limited.
key_takeaways_zh: 模型选择体验正被抽象成平台层能力，而非终端用户决策。
公告没有公开自动路由的评估依据、失败回退策略或成本/质量权衡。
key_takeaways_en: Model selection is increasingly being abstracted into the platform rather than left to end users.
The announcement does not disclose routing evaluation criteria, fallback strategy, or cost/quality trade-offs.

top_items: Self-service credential revocation for incident response - GitHub Changelog
Changes to model selection for Free and Student plans - GitHub Changelog
new_terms_zh: Break-glass capability：在安全事件中用于紧急高权限处置的一键式控制能力。
EMU（Enterprise Managed Users）：由企业集中管理身份与访问控制的 GitHub 用户模式。
new_terms_en: Break-glass capability: an emergency high-privilege control path used to rapidly contain security incidents.
EMU (Enterprise Managed Users): a GitHub user-management mode where identities and access are centrally controlled by the enterprise.
themes_zh: AI 编码工具落地后的企业安全治理正在补课。
模型路由正从显式用户选择转向平台自动化。
themes_en: Enterprise security controls are catching up to AI-assisted developer workflows.
Model routing is shifting from explicit user choice to platform-managed automation.
implications_zh: 工程平台团队应把 AI 工具接入后的凭证生命周期、批量吊销和审计追踪纳入标准事故响应手册。
若内部正在构建多模型编码助手，应优先定义自动路由评测、回退与成本控制机制，而不是只暴露模型下拉菜单。
implications_en: Platform teams should add credential lifecycle management, bulk revocation, and auditability to standard incident-response playbooks for AI-enabled developer tooling.
If you are building an internal multi-model coding assistant, prioritize routing evals, fallback behavior, and cost controls rather than just exposing a model picker.
reading_order: Self-service credential revocation for incident response - GitHub Changelog
Changes to model selection for Free and Student plans - GitHub Changelog
what_to_ignore_zh: GitHub Changelog 的索引页、归档页和重复聚合页，没有新增信息。
仅宣布免费/学生计划体验调整但不提供技术机制、评测数据或架构细节的产品更新。
what_to_ignore_en: The GitHub Changelog index/archive/aggregate pages, which add no new information.
Product updates that announce UX changes for free tiers without technical mechanisms, evaluation data, or architecture detail.
